story.title: The Ember Beneath Ashbend
story.premise: Ashbend is a riverside village built around an old forge, a herb garden, and a bridge that hums at night. For years the forge flame kept the river fog away. This week the flame guttered out, tools began vanishing, and something under the bridge started scratching back.
story.opening: The Wanderer arrives at dawn after seeing a pale blue glow from the old bridge. The villagers are trying to act normal, but every small errand points back to the same worry: the forge, the bridge, and the sealed hollow in the wood are connected.
story.currentObjective: Earn the villagers' trust, recover the missing tools, and learn why the bridge is whispering before the next nightfall.
mysteries: Who has been moving shiny metal objects behind the notice board?
Why does the bridge scratch only after the forge bellows go cold?
What is sealed beneath the oldest tree in Hollow Wood?
beats: Mira needs her pruning shears back before the moonmint wilts.
Tomas can repair the forge bellows, but he is hiding why he went to the bridge.
Lena heard a traveler describe the same blue glow the Wanderer saw.
Orrin suspects Pax, but his rumor may be covering a larger pattern.
Pax knows where the trinkets are hidden and is scared to admit why.

rules.text: The old forge flame keeps river fog and bridge whispers weak while it burns.
Cold blue embers pull small bright metal objects toward the bridge unless hidden in wood or cloth.
Ashbend villagers cooperate faster with people who return tools, keep promises, and do not spread cruel rumors.

factions.name: The Bridge Whisper
goals: draw bright metal to the river

villainPlans.title: Feed the bridge bright pieces
villainPlans.objective: Keep hiding shiny objects until the cold blue ember wakes fully at nightfall.
villainPlans.nextTrigger: If the forge is not rekindled by dusk, the bridge whisper grows louder.
knownFacts: wooden cups muffle the blue ember

pendingReveals: The missing metal follows the bridge pattern.

visual.description: A river-stone square with a notice board and morning market stands.
A soot-dark forge with a cold chimney and borrowed tool racks.
Moonmint beds, soft paths, and bundled herbs beside Mira's workbench.
Warm inn lanterns, a traveler board, and benches facing the square.
An old river bridge with cold blue scratches and fog under the planks.
Dense old trees around a sealed hollow where fog gathers.

items.name: Pruning shears
items.description: Mira's missing moonmint shears, left on the forge bench after Tomas found them near the bridge.

items.name: Brass lantern
items.description: Lena keeps it trimmed for travelers who arrive after dusk.

items.name: Crumpled note
items.description: Mentions scratching beneath the bridge and a blue ember under the river stones.

items.name: Dry bellows leather
items.description: A stiff leather patch that could help Tomas restart the old forge flame.

items.name: Cold blue ember
items.description: A small ember that glows without heat. It pulses near the bridge.

interactables.name: Sooty tool rack
interactables.description: A rack of borrowed tools above the forge bench.
interactables.inspectText: Fresh soot outlines a missing pair of shears. Tomas did not clean this up before leaving.

interactables.name: Blue scrape marks
interactables.description: Cold blue scrapes run along the old bridge stones.
interactables.inspectText: The scrape marks point toward the river and match the color of the cold ember.

interactables.name: Lantern Inn notice board
interactables.description: Traveler reports pinned beside the inn lanterns.
interactables.inspectText: Several notes mention the bridge going silent whenever the forge flame dims.

npcs.name: Mira
npcs.description: A practical gardener trying to keep the moonmint alive while the village blames the wrong people.

appearance.hair: brown hair tucked under an olive headscarf
appearance.outfit: green apron over a cream shirt and brown skirt
appearance.silhouette: Soft garden-worker silhouette with apron, scarf, and flower basket energy.

goals: keep the moonmint alive until nightfall
find out why metal tools are being drawn toward the bridge

ambitions.title: Keep the moonmint alive until nightfall
Trace the silver dew trail toward the bridge

memories.text: Tomas borrowed pruning shears and forgot to return them.
The moonmint leaves curled inward after the forge flame went out.
A trail of silver dew led from the herb beds toward the old bridge.

npcs.name: Tomas
npcs.description: A strong blacksmith who wants to fix the forge before anyone learns how scared the bridge made him.

appearance.hair: dark hair and beard under a charcoal headband
appearance.outfit: brown leather apron, rolled cream sleeves, black work trousers
appearance.silhouette: Large blacksmith silhouette with apron, gloves, and squared stance.

flaws: hides fear until it becomes a problem

goals: avoid admitting he heard a voice under the bridge

ambitions.title: Restart the forge flame before dusk
Avoid admitting he heard a voice under the bridge

secrets.text: Tomas heard the bridge whisper his name when he found Mira's shears.

memories.text: The forge bellows need dry leather before nightfall.
The old anvil rang by itself when the blue glow flashed under the bridge.
Tomas found Mira's shears near the bridge, panicked, and left them on the forge bench.

npcs.name: Lena
npcs.description: A calm innkeeper who turns rumors into useful witness accounts.

appearance.hair: auburn hair tied neatly away from the face
appearance.outfit: amber travel vest, long skirt, lantern keeper sash
appearance.silhouette: Readable innkeeper silhouette with lantern colors and composed stance.

fears: someone crossing the bridge alone after dusk

goals: make sure no one crosses the bridge alone after dusk

ambitions.title: Collect enough witness stories to prove the bridge danger
Keep travelers away from the bridge after dusk

memories.text: A traveler heard scratching beneath the old bridge.
The brass lantern burned blue for three seconds when pointed at Hollow Wood.
Lena promised the Wanderer a room if they help calm Ashbend before nightfall.

npcs.name: Orrin
npcs.description: An experienced elder who sees patterns but sometimes turns suspicion into rumor.

appearance.outfit: blue merchant cloak over tan robes, walking stick
appearance.silhouette: Elder silhouette with cloak, cane, and notice-board authority.

fears: being dismissed as old and dramatic

goals: prove the village pattern before anyone laughs

ambitions.title: Prove the village pattern before anyone laughs

memories.text: Pax keeps hiding shiny things behind the notice board.
Every missing object has been metal: shears, spoons, nails, hinges, and the inn's spare key.
The notice board map has a faded mark where the bridge, forge, and Hollow Wood form a triangle.

npcs.name: Pax
npcs.description: A nervous child hiding shiny things because the bridge whisper scares him into obeying.

appearance.outfit: rust-red vest, patched blue trousers, small side satchel
appearance.silhouette: Small anxious silhouette with satchel and hunched shoulders.

fears: the bridge whisper saying his name
traits.speechStyle: quick, evasive, small bursts of honesty

goals: keep the hidden trinket pile secret
work up the courage to tell someone about the whisper

ambitions.title: Keep the hidden trinket pile secret
Work up the courage to tell someone about the whisper

secrets.text: Pax hid a pile of shiny objects behind the notice board after the bridge whispered to bring bright pieces.

memories.text: Orrin blamed Pax for a missing spoon.
Pax did hide some shiny things, but only after hearing the bridge whisper 'bring bright pieces'.
The cold blue ember stopped humming when Pax covered it with a wooden cup.

quests.title: Return the pruning shears
quests.description: Mira needs the moonmint shears back before dusk. Tomas left them on the forge bench, but the real question is why they were near the bridge.

quests.title: Rekindle the old forge
quests.description: Tomas needs dry bellows leather from Hollow Wood to restart the forge flame and test whether it quiets the bridge.

quests.title: Listen at the old bridge
quests.description: Lena wants proof before she bars the bridge at night. Find the crumpled note or the cold blue ember near the crossing.
